other_observers: John Vanderpoel, Glenn Walbek etc  plus the Bushong boys.
description: A medium sized shorebird about the size of a Dunlin.  Completely dark gray head and upper breast, black eye with a thin light eyering.  Medium sized bill that was quite bright orange at the base and dark at the tip.  Dark gray upperparts, but with light edging to the feathers.  Lighter from the middle of the breast to the tail, but with lines of darker chevrons from the middle of the breast to the legs. Quite bright orange legs and feet. Bird was feeding along the edge of the reservoir and in the creek. The bird did not call.
